title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Biharsharif
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Biharsharif constituency.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Biharsharif
